---
title: "Arabidopsis STRING network and maize orthologues."
format: html
date: "2026-02-20"
---

The aim of this code is to prepare Arabidopsis STRING network for use in Cytoscape with maize orthologues.

```{bash prepare-string}
# STRING network for A.thaliana was downloaded from STRING manually
zcat 3702.protein.links.full.v12.0.txt.gz | sed 's/3702\.//g' > ~/full-network-At
pigz --best ~/full-network-At
mv ~/full-network-At.gz .
```
